productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Ciero Low St Blue Casual Shoes
description: All suede for a smooth touch and yellow stripes and lacing for style, the Ciero Low ST shoe from adidas originals makes for an easy transition from the Basketball court to street style. UpperSuede upper with adidas patented 3-Stripes on the sides of the midfootLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue for optimum fitPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleMoulded midsole detailing for vintage style and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with bee hive shaped grooves on the forefoot and herringbone grooves on the backfoot for absolute durability, grip and tractionShoe careUse a suede brush to clean the upperUse a leather impregnation sprayDo not store in direct sunlight
